caption:
The archives are closed, but I didn't lock the door. The only light comes from the overhead bulb, casting long shadows against the stacks. My blazer is open, revealing the deep v of my blouse, and I know the student watching me feels the same pull I feel. We aren't just reading history tonight; we're writing our own. 
🎓 #AcademicAdventures #ForbiddenFruit
